provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall broad reptilian alien with dark grey-green scales covered in white scar tissue from dozens of fights, brow ridges chipped, crest ridge with three filed notch-marks indicating confirmed kills, amber eyes that have seen more violence than most species live through, thick tail with two missing tail-scales from an old wound, wearing heavy bronze plate armor layered over dark leather with a faded crimson sash, the armor itself tells a story — each dent and repair represents a specific fight, honor tokens on the belt some of them clearly taken from opponents
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Veshan faction. Forged material vocabulary with overlapping scales, dark bronze plate, leather underpadding. Martial culture expressed through gear.
